title: polygala subopposita
intro: Polygala subopposita, also known as Yin Chiao, is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, as well as its ability to protect against respiratory infections and promote antioxidant activity. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including bronchitis, fever, and sore throats, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. Polygala subopposita can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
